3063420.name: Coffee Quest VR
3063420.description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of coffee culture as you design and manage your own cozy café. From crafting exquisite espresso drinks to preparing delicious pastries, your goal is to satisfy the diverse tastes of your customers. Manage your time efficiently to handle the morning rush and cater to unique customer preferences. With each successful order, unlock new recipes and expand your coffee empire. It's not just about serving coffee; it's about creating an unforgettable experience for every customer
3063420.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
